patiolights.name: patio lights
patiolights.validCommandsDesc:
Valid commands:
- on
- off
- white
- red
- blue
- green
- up (in brightness; does not consistently work)
- down (in brightness; does not consistently work)
- party (send multiple times to get different patterns)
- fast (take the party up a notch)
- slow (take the party down a notch)
